LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER BELINDA RYDER-LOOMIS' AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 8, 2009. MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO THE COURT BY DECEMBER 3, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER BELINDA RYDER-LOOMIS' AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT 5 NAMES OF PROPOSED ARBITRATORS AND THE COURT WILL SELECT ONE FROM THE LIST. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER LEAVING THE NAME OF THE ARBITRATOR IN BLANK. THE COURT WILL ALSO REVIEW THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEE. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
